# The Açai Club

> The Açai Club is a UK-based açai bowl restaurant chain with three stores in Reading, Beaconsfield, and Datchet. We serve pure, never-blended açai with real ingredients, run a community Sunday Run Club, and offer rewards through our mobile app.

## About

- [Culture & story](https://theacaiclub.com/about/): How The Açai Club started, our manifest (Never Blended, Real Ingredients, Wellness, Community First), and the founders' journey from a single fridge to three stores.

## Stores

- [All stores](https://theacaiclub.com/stores/): Find us in Reading, Beaconsfield, and Datchet — opening hours, addresses, phone numbers, and online ordering links.
  - **Reading**: 85 Kings Road, Reading RG1 3DD · 0118 228 8750 · Mon–Fri 08:00–19:00, Sat–Sun 08:00–18:00.
  - **Beaconsfield**: 22 Gregories Road, Beaconsfield HP9 1HQ · 01494 370876 · Mon–Fri 08:00–19:00, Sat–Sun 08:00–18:00.
  - **Datchet**: 10 High Street, Datchet SL3 9EA · 01753 297015 · Mon–Fri 08:00–19:00, Sat–Sun 08:00–18:00.

## Run Club

- [Run Club](https://theacaiclub.com/run-club/): Free community run from our Beaconsfield and Datchet stores every Sunday at 8am. 5 miles, run/walk format (3 minutes run, 1 minute walk), all fitness levels welcome, no booking required. Earn one berry in the app per run. Reading coming soon.

## App & rewards

- [The Açai Club app](https://theacaiclub.com/app/): iOS and Android app for ordering ahead and earning rewards. Berry Rewards (one berry per regular bowl, nine berries = a free bowl) and Cup Rewards (one cup per drink, nine cups = a free drink). First berry on us when you sign up. [App Store](https://apps.apple.com/gb/app/the-a%C3%A7ai-club/id6478923734) · [Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.epostechnologies.theacaiclub).

## Allergens & safety

- [Allergen information](https://theacaiclub.com/allergens/): All 14 UK major allergens are handled in our open kitchens. Product-specific allergen and nutritional information is available in our online ordering system. Customers with serious allergies or intolerances should contact their nearest store before ordering.

## Careers

- [Careers](https://theacaiclub.com/careers/): Open roles across our three UK stores. We hire for great team fit, competitive pay, and a clear career path.

## Contact

- [Contact](https://theacaiclub.com/contact/): General enquiries hello@theacaiclub.com. Per-store email addresses on the stores page.
